About Us
We Design Spaces That Last
TDEG is a Melbourne-based interior design and architecture studio creating enduring spaces across Australia.
We specialise in
interiors for homes, workplaces, retail, and hospitality
—from styling and staging to full-scale fit-outs. Our team also delivers thoughtful building design for
new homes, renovations, and extensions.
TDEG
, we focus on detail-driven, timeless interiors that elevate everyday experiences and reflect your vision—beautifully and functionally.
Testimonials
We engaged TDEG for drafting plans for our home renovation. From day one, the team was responsive, knowledgeable, and incredibly thorough. They handled all council submissions, made several plan adjustments without fuss, and helped us get approval faster than expected. It was a stress-free experience thanks to their professionalism.
Amelia
Doncaster, VIC
We had no idea where to start with our new home’s interiors until we found TDEG. They worked with us room by room, helping us choose colours, textures, lighting, and furniture layouts that matched our style. The team was patient, gave great suggestions, and respected our budget. Our home finally feels like us.
Navneet B
Point Cook, VIC
I approached TDEG for the interior design and layout of my new dental clinic. They took time to understand how we operate and created a space that’s functional, modern, and welcoming for patients. Their attention to workflow and detail made a huge difference. Highly recommend them for any commercial fit-out.
Eliza
Berwick, VIC
Ready to bring your project to life?
Let’s collaborate and turn your vision into reality.
Call Us Now

products.text:
Services – The Design Element Group
Loading...
Services
Building Design
Interiors-first thinking. Structure with purpose.
Our building design process starts with how a space will be lived in and experienced. We don’t just design from the outside in—we design from the inside out.
Whether it’s a new build, a renovation, or a tailored fit-out, we create architectural solutions that align with your vision while ensuring flow, function, and spatial harmony.
Services include:
New builds
Renovations & extensions
Interior-led architectural planning
Spatial flow & layout optimization
Fit-outs for residential and commercial projects
Interior Design
Spaces that reflect how you live, work, and connect.
We design interiors that feel as good as they look—crafted around people, purpose, and detail. From personal spaces to commercial environments, every project is thoughtfully tailored to its context and users.
We take a human-first approach, shaping interiors that are immersive, practical, and emotionally resonant.
Commercial Design:
Workspaces
Retail environments
Hospitality venues
Personal & Lifestyle Spaces:
Residential interiors
Airbnb & short-term rentals
Compact & creative living solutions
Design Documentation & Project Support
Translating ideas into action—and outcomes.
When vision meets execution, we’re there to guide the process. We provide the detailed documentation and project support needed to bring your ideas to life with clarity and confidence.
From permit-ready plans to consultant coordination and ongoing project oversight, we help streamline the path from design concept to built reality.
Services include:
CAD drawings & technical documentation
Council approvals & permit application support
Consultant & contractor coordination
Project management assistance
From concept to completion, we collaborate closely with clients to design spaces that not only look beautiful—but feel right.
OUR BUILDING DESIGN SERVICES INCLUDE
Extension
Renovation
New Home
Commercial Development
Commercial Renovation
Unit Development
Shop Fitouts Designs
